summary: Backend-only Task 10 validation checks passed, including deterministic validation flow, behavioral diagnostics, and full regression.

rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration. Deterministic validation requirements and sanity-check expectations are satisfied by current implementation and tests.
